title: Jingiliya Lyrics Puli Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Jingiliya
Singer(s):Javad Ali, Pooja AV
Movie: Puli
Music: DSP

Nethu raathiri
Enna aachu enna aachu
Neril vandhuta
Pochu pochu ayyo pochu
Selaiyedutha
Pechu moochu ninnu pochu
Kanna kattinaa
Veena pochu veena pochu

Elumicham tholukkulla
Maambazhatha vecha pulla
Pookale poopathilla
Neeyillaama kaatukulla

Akkam pakam neeyum illa
Annanththanni sellavilla
Kuyilu koottukulla
Neeyillama paatum illa

Kattil arayil
Enna aachu enna aachu
Katti pudichaan
Ayyo appa ellam pochu
Kannam kadichaan
Yemma sollu enna aachu
Kannu muzhichen
Ellam pochu ellam pochu

Naatukulla nallavane
Kattiluku kettavane
Kalkandu ponnu iva
Kadavaayil vachikada

Pagaluku kettavale
Raathiriku nallavale
Achapada venaam enna
Katchukulla vachikadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Jingiliya?

The song Jingiliya is an energetic dance number that adds a lively vibe to the movie Puli.

Who are the singers of Jingiliya?

The song is sung by AV Pooja and Javed Ali.

What is the context of the song in the movie Puli?

The song appears in a vibrant and celebratory sequence within the fantasy setting of Puli.

When was the song Jingiliya released?

The song was released in the year 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Jingiliya from the movie Puli is a high-energy dance number that perfectly complements the film's adventurous and fantastical theme. Sung by AV Pooja and Javed Ali, the track is filled with vibrant beats and catchy rhythms, making it ideal for party and celebration settings. The song captures the essence of joy and excitement, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in the magical world of Puli. Its lively tempo and dynamic vocals create an atmosphere of fun and festivity.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with the vibrant beats of Jingiliya from the fantasy adventure film Puli. Sung by the dynamic duo AV Pooja and Javed Ali, this track is a perfect blend of energy and rhythm. Dive into the magical world of Puli with this electrifying dance number!
stanzaMeanings: Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is caught.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is confused.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is caught.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is confused.
When you hold it tight, when you hold it gently, the stars spin in your eyes.
With a single dot, with ten dots, with a stick in your eyes.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is caught.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is confused.

Last night, what happened, what happened? It came in reality, it's gone, it's gone, oh no, it's gone. When the saree was removed, the talk and breath stopped. When the eyes closed, it was all lost, all lost.
Inside the lemon peel, there's a mango. Flowers didn't bloom without you in the forest.
There's no one around, the river doesn't flow. The cuckoo in the cage doesn't sing without you.
The basket of flowers is closed, don't pick them.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is caught.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is confused.
In the bed, what happened, what happened? He held tight, oh no, everything is gone. He bit the cheek, tell me what happened. I opened my eyes, everything is gone, everything is gone.
A good person in the village, a bad one in bed. She's a sweet girl, keep her at the door.
A bad one in the day, a good one at night. Don't be afraid, keep her in your heart.
My life is dry, come make it wet.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is caught.
Jingiliya jingiliya, the little bird is confused.
